description: Discover the best of the collection of Etat Libre d’Orange in this assortment of 20 x 2 ml samples. description: We all know how hard it is to choose a fragrance for someone else. But you can still give a fragrance and leave the choice up to the lucky giftee! Choose the amount, get a code, send it on — and someone will receive a gift that makes them very happy. Available for a year.

Woody, Chypre The flame becomes the universal attraction of a huge, full-bodied rose with a heart of honey. A wake as powerful as any chypre perfume can be. This candle is the crucial experiment: fragrance is light, and light is fragrance. A blend of rays in rainbow hues. Legend has it that Newton received an apple on his head; here, it's an elegant, honeyed rose that will turn your whole version of the world upside down. Vegetable based waxWeight: 230 gr
